title: Label the item rows (1,2,3....) in tables for easy reference
excerpt: Hello. My team regularly reviews an in-progress project list. It would be really helpful if the rows were numbered along the left margin so I can easily draw a team member’s attention to a specific project or item. We te…

posts.author: kyrinis (marie K)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. My team regularly reviews an in-progress project list. It would be really helpful if the rows were numbered along the left margin so I can easily draw a team member’s attention to a specific project or item. We tend to jump around the board a bit. Thanks.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: You can use the Auto number column.

posts.author: kyrinis (marie K)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you!!! I should have checked the community forum first to see if there was a way. Will do so next time I have a ‘great’ idea.
